# Quickstart Snapshot

- Source: <https://agentskills.io/skill-creation/quickstart>
- Retrieved: 2026-04-01

## Key points

- The minimal viable skill is one `SKILL.md` file with a short `name`, a trigger-oriented `description`, and compact instructions.
- The example emphasizes that the description is how the agent decides when to activate the skill.
- The quickstart highlights `.agents/skills/` as the cross-client discovery path.

## BitSearch implications

- The BitSearch template should be small enough to read as a single coherent workflow.
- Installation instructions should recommend `.agents/skills/` first, then native client directories as fallbacks.
